use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Showing user avatars in comment sections or review threads
Displaying profile pictures in user cards or member lists
User identification in chat, messaging, or collaboration interfaces
Avatar display in social media feeds and activity logs
ai_summary: A minimalist avatar component built with Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images in a circular container with automatic fallback to a muted background when images fail to load. Provides Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback subcomponents for flexible composition and graceful degradation.
